entries.rationale: Intentional protocol two's-complement bit reinterpretation; callers use this only for signed 32-bit wire fields.
Intentional protocol two's-complement bit reinterpretation when decoding signed 32-bit wire fields.
Intentional PCM16 two's-complement reinterpretation from little-endian unsigned bytes to signed samples.
Intentional PCM16 two's-complement reinterpretation from signed samples to little-endian unsigned bytes.
Intentional low-byte extraction while serializing PCM16 samples; high byte is written separately.
Developer-only security checker reads paths only after cleanRepoPath confines them to the repository root.
Operator-supplied pricing override path from config; same trust model as the gateway's own config file. Loaded once at startup and on hot-reload via the file watcher.

entries.snippet: req, err := http.NewRequestWithContext(ctx, http.MethodGet, baseURL+"/api/tags", nil)
entries.rationale: E2E harness validates OLLAMA_BASE_URL as localhost, loopback, or private-network before constructing the dev-only request.
E2E harness validates OLLAMA_BASE_URL as localhost, loopback, or private-network before executing the dev-only request.
